page_metadata.biotools__summary: A standalone script for analysis, visualization, and annotation of a pre-filtered set of protein/ligand complexes deposited with the PDB with ligand RSCC values that are below a threshold of 0.6.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A standalone script for analysis, visualization, and annotation of a pre-filtered set of protein/ligand complexes deposited with the PDB with ligand RSCC values that are below a threshold of 0.6.
